items.summary: Scientists have developed an experimental diabetes and obesity pill that works in a completely different way from drugs like Ozempic. items.title: Scientists reverse anxiety by fixing a tiny brain circuit
items.summary: A newly identified group of amygdala neurons appears to play a central role in anxiety and social behavior. Restoring normal activity in this tiny brain circuit reversed anxiety and social deficits in mice, revealing a promising new target for future treatments.
